opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with no booking tools detected on site or GMB profile.
opportunities.observation: Boise homeowners searching after hours are booking bluefrog competitors with online scheduling.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI booking widget capturing drain and plumbing jobs 24/7 without phone dependency.

opportunities.label: Review Response Automation
opportunities.signal: 298 Google reviews at 4.7 stars with no detected owner response pattern or CRM tools.
opportunities.observation: Hundreds of unanswered reviews signal missed trust-building with future Boise customers.
opportunities.fix: Automate personalized GMB review replies using AI trained on plumbing service context.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected and phone-only contact is the sole inbound channel.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked or missed call from Boise leads vanishes with no follow-up capability.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call recording with auto-CRM capture to log, score, and follow up every lead.
